{{Quote|These Geonosians have been working on a new Confederate infantry prototype. Destroy the schematics before they can use it to build a new droid army.|An [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]]|<ref name="Battlefront II" />}}
The '''Confederate infantry prototype''' was a model of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]]. It was created by [[Gizor Dellso]]<ref name="Battlefront II" />—a fugitive<ref name="Mustafar">{{DB|location|mustafar|Mustafar}}</ref> [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|refused to surrender]] after the Confederacy of Independent Systems was defeated during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="Gizor Dellso">{{DB|character|gizordellso|Dellso, Gizor}}</ref>—and several fellow [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]], intending to add them to an [[Army/Legends|army]] of reactivated battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in hopes of [[Gizor Dellso's army|resurrecting]] the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. However, both the prototype's schematics and the [[Techno Union droid factory/Legends|hidden factory]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] where the droids were built were [[Battle of Mustafar (Imperial Period)|destroyed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]]<ref name="Battlefront II" /> [[Time/Legends|sometime]] between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[18 BBY/Legends|18]] and [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]].<ref name="Dating" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Confederate infantry prototype was originally created for ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'', a [[2005]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Wikipedia:First-person shooter|first-]] and [[Wikipedia:Third-person shooter|third-person shooter]] developed by [[Pandemic Studios]] and published by [[LucasArts]].<ref name="Battlefront II" />
